Bash(./venv/Scripts/python gemini_browser.py "This image is for the hero section of a SaaS landing page promoting an AI-powered LINE marketing tool. I need a warm, aspirational editorial portrait of a Japanese woman who is a small beauty salon owner. She is in her late 20s with shoulder-length dark brown wavy hair parted slightly to the side. She wears a beige linen apron over a plain white crew-neck t-shirt, with a thin gold bracelet on her right wrist. She stands at the entrance of her cozy neighborhood salon, arms gently crossed, looking directly at the camera with a confident, warm smile that says my business is thriving. Behind her, the salon interior is softly visible with wooden-framed mirrors, warm amber pendant lights, neatly folded white towels, and a few green potted plants on a wooden shelf. The entrance has a glass door with a brass handle. Late afternoon golden sunlight enters from the right side, creating a beautiful rim light on her hair and a warm glow on her skin. Her makeup is minimal and natural. The photograph should feel like an editorial feature in a Japanese lifestyle magazine, authentic, warm, and aspirational. Shot with a Fujifilm X-T5 and a 56mm f/1.2 lens at f/1.4, producing a creamy, shallow depth of field that gently blurs the salon behind her. Color grading is warm with subtle coral and sage green tones. Composed using the rule of thirds with the subject on the left third. Aspect ratio 16:9, landscape orientation. Do not include any text, logos, watermarks, or overlaid graphics." --output /c/dev/LINEsupport/apps/web/public/images/lp/gen --aspect 16:9)
